name: Add action list support to Forma

plannedActions.name: Update Forma.ts imports: add FormaCollection and Action imports
Add readonly actions: FormaCollection<Action> field to Forma class; initialize in constructor from optional cfg.actions array
plannedActions.test: verify constructor accepts actions array, actions property returns FormaCollection

plannedActions.name: Update Forma.SCHEMA: add actions field using FormaCollection.schemaOf(Action)
plannedActions.test: verify schema includes actions field with correct Avro structure

plannedActions.name: Verify patch() ignores actions field (only updates name/summary)
plannedActions.test: test patch() does not modify actions

plannedActions.name: Add comprehensive tests: constructor with actions, FormaCollection CRUD via forma.actions.*, fuzzy ID matching, Avro serialize/deserialize with actions

references.text: DECISION: Direct exposure pattern - expose FormaCollection as readonly public field. API: forma.actions.addItem() instead of forma.addAction(). Zero boilerplate, Kafka-compatible (FormaCollection methods are controlled mutation points for future event emission)
FormaCollection.schemaOf(Action) - generates Avro array schema for typed collections (ActionFormaCollection). Returns { name, namespace, type: 'array', items: Action.SCHEMA }
Identifiable.SCHEMA - static getter returning Avro record schema with id field (UUID64.avroSchema). Namespace: scvoice.nameforma
FormaCollection API: addItem(cfg), deleteItem(id), getItem(id), patchItem(id, cfg), moveItem(id, opts), items(filter?), size - all accept FuzzyId for fuzzy matching
Constructor pattern: new Forma({ actions: [{ status: 'todo' }, ...] }) - FormaCollection initialized from cfg.actions array using Action.createForParent()
DECISION: patch() ignores actions field; use forma.actions.addItem/deleteItem/patchItem for mutations (Kafka-friendly granular updates)
Kafka integration: FormaCollection methods (addItem, deleteItem, patchItem) are future event emission points per transactional outbox pattern (see T_AZ008zeCc)
Action class - extends Forma with status field (todo|done), has SCHEMA and createForParent() for FormaCollection integration
FormaCollection class (forma-collection.ts) - encapsulates array, CRUD methods use Identifiable.idFilter() for fuzzy ID matching
Forma base class - extends Identifiable with name/summary, Avro schema, patch() method

summary: Add readonly actions: FormaCollection<Action> field to Forma with Avro schema support, direct FormaCollection API exposure, and comprehensive tests
